infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We use the camera to capture a live selfie at every check-in and a photo of the meter when you record a reading. This proves you were on site.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Your GPS is used to stamp every check-in, meter reading, and trip so kilometers are auto-calculated and audit-ready.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to attach photos to records when needed.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Field Staff Manager to access your camera for selfie check-ins and meter photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Field Staff Manager to use your location to stamp check-ins and auto-track field trips.
